description: Drag-and-drop block programming for Arduino — build programs visually and Maker Block Studio writes the C++ for you. Works with PlatformIO and the Arduino CLI.
config.title: Maker Block Studio
config.generateOnChange: Generate code automatically whenever blocks change. When disabled, code is generated only when the Generate Code button is pressed.
config.showMinimap: Show a minimap overview of the block workspace in the bottom-right corner.
config.annotateGeneratedCode: Add a comment above each generated statement, identifying the block that produced it, using the block's tooltip. Comments you add to blocks yourself are always included, regardless of this setting.
config.catalogPaths: Local directories or remote URLs for block catalog YAML files. Local paths (relative to the workspace root, or absolute) are scanned recursively. URLs (http/https) are downloaded to the project .blocks/ folder on first load; use the "Refresh Remote Catalogs" command to force re-download.
command.refreshCatalogs: Maker Block Studio: Refresh Remote Catalogs
command.enableClaudeCode: Maker Block Studio: Set Up AI Assistants (Copilot & Claude Code)
viewContainer.catalogBrowser.title: Maker Block Studio
view.catalogRegistry.name: Community Catalog
command.refreshRegistry: Maker Block Studio: Refresh Community Catalog
command.searchRegistry: Maker Block Studio: Search Community Catalog
command.contributeCatalog: Maker Block Studio: Contribute Catalog to Community…
config.catalogRegistryUrl: URL of the community block catalog index (index.json). Change to use a private or self-hosted registry.
config.contributionRepo: GitHub repository (owner/repo) that authored catalogs are contributed to. Change to point at a fork or private community catalog.
config.fallbackFramework: Framework to assume when no project file (platformio.ini, sketch.yaml, or app.yaml) is detected for the open file. Used only as a last resort — a detected project always takes precedence. Set automatically when you pick a framework from the editor's "Select framework" action.
walkthrough.title: Get Started with Maker Block Studio
walkthrough.description: Learn how to build Arduino programs visually with drag-and-drop blocks.
walkthrough.openWithBlocks.title: Open a file with Maker Block Studio
walkthrough.openWithBlocks.description:
Right-click any `.cpp` or `.ino` file → **Open With…** → **Maker Block Studio**.

Drag blocks to build your program — the C++ code is generated automatically.
walkthrough.arduinoCli.title: Compile & upload with Arduino CLI IDE
walkthrough.arduinoCli.description:
Maker Block Studio focuses on visual programming — it doesn't compile or flash your board. Install the companion **Arduino CLI IDE** extension to compile, upload, and monitor your sketch right from the editor toolbar, without leaving VS Code.

[Install Arduino CLI IDE](command:extension.open?%22linucs.vscode-arduino-cli-ide%22)
walkthrough.authorBlocks.title: Author custom blocks
walkthrough.authorBlocks.description:
Create block catalogs for new hardware libraries. Ask Copilot or Claude Code to author them with the block-author skill, or write YAML by hand.

[Set Up AI Assistants](command:blocks-editor.enableClaudeCodeIntegration)
walkthrough.communityCatalog.title: Browse community catalogs
walkthrough.communityCatalog.description:
Discover and download block catalogs contributed by the community.

[Open Community Catalog](command:blocks-editor.catalogRegistry.focus)
walkthrough.contribute.title: Help others learn — contribute
walkthrough.contribute.description:
I believe Arduino and block programming can truly help beginners learn advanced concepts — including edge AI. But I'm a solo developer, and I can't author blocks for every hardware device and use case out there.

If you also believe in sharing knowledge and helping others learn, **please contribute**: submit your block catalogs, open issues, or send pull requests. Every contribution makes visual programming accessible to more people.

[Share your Blocks](https://github.com/linucs/blocks-community-catalog)
mcp.blocksEditor.label: Maker Block Studio
view.localCatalogs.name: Project Blocks
command.refreshLocalCatalogs: Maker Block Studio: Refresh Project Blocks
command.contributeLocalCatalog: Share this block catalog with the Community
